Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.util

Class SharedHttpClient

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.util.SharedHttpClient
public final class SharedHttpClient extends Object
Shared OkHttpClient singleton for the entire library.

All platform clients share one Dispatcher (maxRequests=1024) and ConnectionPool for efficient concurrent connection management.

Use newBuilder() to create derived clients that share the same Dispatcher and ConnectionPool while adding interceptors.

Custom settings can be applied via configure(HttpClientConfig) before the first call to get().

Since:
1.0.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    Applies custom configuration before the client is initialized.

  • Method Details

    • configure

      public static void configure(HttpClientConfig config)
      Applies custom configuration before the client is initialized.

      Must be called before the first call to get().

      Parameters:
      config - configuration to apply
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the client is already initialized

    • getConfig

      public static HttpClientConfig getConfig()
      Returns the current configuration.
      Returns:
      current configuration (read-only)

    • get

      public static okhttp3.OkHttpClient get()
      Returns the shared OkHttpClient instance. The client is lazily initialized on first call.
      Returns:
      shared OkHttpClient

    • newBuilder

      public static okhttp3.OkHttpClient.Builder newBuilder()
      Returns a builder derived from the shared client. The derived client shares Dispatcher and ConnectionPool.
      Returns:
      a new OkHttpClient.Builder
